name: open-computer-use
description: Open-source macOS Computer Use MCP server packaged as a Codex plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Control macOS apps from Codex with the open local server
interface.longDescription: Open Computer Use packages this repository's open-source macOS automation server as a Codex plugin. It exposes the same nine desktop-control MCP tools through the locally built OpenComputerUse app bundle, with an AX-first and keyboard-first strategy that tries to avoid stealing focus until global pointer input is truly required.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the current UI state of this Mac app without stealing focus when possible
Open a new local document with keyboard shortcuts first, then type content without moving my real pointer unless required
Drive the fixture app and verify the nine computer-use tools still behave correctly
